‘She never hurt a soul’: Grieving father speaks after daughter killed in B.C. school shooting

Nine people, including the 18-year-old suspect, are dead, and roughly 25 others were injured after a shooting at Tumbler Ridge Secondary School in B.C. Investigators believe the suspect acted alone.

‘We’re not alone’: Greenlanders react to Canada’s consulate

The week France and Canada open new consulates in the capital of Greenland, it’s swarming with diplomats, politicians, journalists, security and the curious, CTV News' Abigail Bimman reports from Nuuk.
